figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of the multi-scale sinusoidal positional encoding defined in Definition 3.6 for A = 10 and T = 20. For each a ∈ [A], the vectors qa,t = (sin(t/T a/A), cos(t/T a/A))⊤, t = 1, . . . , T , lie on the unit circle, with smaller a corresponding to faster rotation.
Figure 2: Main building blocks of the transformer construction to control the approximation error.
